shorts.title: Your pharmacist hopes you never Google this 💊
shorts.description:
Every brand-name cold medicine on that shelf is just 2-3 generic pills combined.

NyQuil = Tylenol + Robitussin + Benadryl
Advil PM = Advil + Benadryl

One dose of NyQuil: $4
The same 3 generics: 12 cents

Cold Plan breaks down every brand-name cold medicine into its generic recipe.

🔗 cold-plan-app.web.app
Free. No login. No ads. No data collected.

#pharmacy #coldmedicine #generics #savemoney #pharmacist #lifehack #otc #drugstore #healthcare #drugprices

shorts.title: The $0.47 NyQuil recipe 💰
shorts.description:
One Tylenol. One Robitussin. One Benadryl. Three pills. That's the entire NyQuil recipe.

Same active ingredients. Same doses. Same effect.
The only difference is the green color and the price tag.

10-pack NyQuil: $12
30 doses of the same 3 generics: under $5

Cold Plan breaks down every brand-name cold medicine into its generic recipe.

shorts.title: Cold medicine is a 2,000% markup 💸
shorts.description:
Most pharmacy products: 30-50% markup.
Cold medicine? Try 2,000%.

A $12 box of NyQuil contains about 12 cents worth of generic ingredients.

They're not selling you medicine. They're selling you convenience and a brand name.

The pharmacist behind the counter knows this. They buy the same generics you should be buying.

🔗 cold-plan-app.web.app
Free. No login. No ads. No data collected.

#markup #pharmacy #coldmedicine #generics #savemoney #drugstore #lifehack #otc #healthcare #drugprices

shorts.title: I stopped buying brand-name cold medicine 30 years ago ✈️
shorts.description:
30 years of business travel. Over 1.3 million miles on United.

Every cold I caught on the road, I treated with the same handful of generic pills. A $20 kit that lasted 6 months.

Meanwhile my coworkers were dropping $15 on NyQuil every time they got the sniffles.

I finally built an app that does what I used to do on napkins in hotel rooms.

🔗 cold-plan-app.web.app
Free. No login. No ads. No data collected.

#businesstravel #coldmedicine #generics #savemoney #founderstory #lifehack #otc #roadwarrior #healthcare #unitedairlines
